basic_details.job_title: ICSSR Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Assistant, Field Investigator Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Council of Social Science Research (ICSSR)

age_limit.details: No specific age limit is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate in any Social Science discipline with a minimum of 55% marks for Research Assistant. Graduate in any Social Science discipline with minimum of 55% marks for Field Investigator.
qualification.details: Research Assistant: Postgraduate in any Social Science discipline with a minimum of 55% marks. Preference will be given to candidates with NET/M.Phil./Ph.D. Field Investigator: Graduate in any Social Science discipline with minimum of 55% marks. Preference will be given to candidates with a four-year graduation program.

salary_details.pay_scale: Research Assistant: Rs. 37,000/- p.m. Field Investigator: Rs. 20,000/- p.m.
salary_details.details: Research Assistant: Rs. 37,000/- p.m. Field Investigator: Rs. 20,000/- p.m.

selection_process: Walk in Interview Documents required at the time of interview: Updated CV
Duly filled application form Candidates unable to appear in person can appear via "Google meet" through video conferencing upon request.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ICSSR Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ICSSR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Research Assistant and Field Investigator positions is 20th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: For the Research Assistant position, candidates must have a Postgraduate degree in any Social Science discipline with a minimum of 55% marks. Preference will be given to those with NET, M.Phil., or Ph.D.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for a Field Investigator in this ICSSR recruitment?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Field Investigator post will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 20,000/-. This is a project-based role under the ICSSR funded project.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available in this ICSSR recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies announced by the Indian Council of Social Science Research. This includes 1 post for Research Assistant and 5 posts for Field Investigator.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application process for ICSSR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to send their complete application along with their CV and required documents via email to the specified address. The application mode is strictly email-based.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for ICSSR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: As per the information available, there is no application fee mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these ICSSR posts?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves a Walk-in Interview. Candidates may also have the option to appear for the interview via video conferencing if they are unable to attend in person.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required at the time of the interview?
faq.answer: At the time of the interview, candidates must bring their updated CV, self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and a duly filled application form.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates apply for both Research Assistant and Field Investigator posts?
faq.answer: The notification does not explicitly state whether candidates can apply for both posts. It is advisable to check the detailed advertisement or contact the recruiting body for clarification on this aspect.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for ICSSR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is provided in the "Important Links" section of this article. You can also visit the official website of Kalindi College for more details.
